testcase.name: Documentation Site Tests › homepage loads correctly
Documentation Site Tests › get started link navigates correctly
testcase.error:
[chromium] › report-demo.spec.js:11:3 › Documentation Site Tests › get started link navigates correctly
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: page.goto: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - navigating to "https://playwright.dev/", waiting until "load"
10 | 11 | test('get started link navigates correctly', async ({ page }) => { > 12 | await page.goto('/'); | ^ 13 | await page.getByRole('link', { name: 'Get started' }).click(); 14 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/.*intro/); 15 | }); at C:\Users\kenia.machaca\practices-ci-cd\playwright-secrets-exercise\tests\report-demo.spec.js:12:16

testcase.name: Documentation Site Tests › docs page has installation heading
Documentation Site Tests › page has navigation links
API Configuration Tests › base URL is accessible
API Configuration Tests › environment variables are readable
Secrets and Environment Configuration › API_URL secret is configured and accessible
testcase.system-out: === Secret Validation (Safe Logging) === API_URL is not set - using baseURL from config AUTH_TOKEN is not set - running without auth === End Secret Validation ===

testcase.name: Secrets and Environment Configuration › baseURL is correctly configured from environment
testcase.system-out: Running tests against: https://playwright.dev Page title: Fast and reliable end-to-end testing for modern web apps | Playwright

testcase.name: Secrets and Environment Configuration › prints secret length not value - AUTH_TOKEN validation
testcase.system-out: --- Auth Token Validation --- Token present: false Token length: 0 No token provided - skipping token validation
